description_long: This object is a small bird with an olive-green back, yellowish underparts, and a long, straight tail. Its head features a striking black-and-white facial pattern, with a black mask around the eyes and a white patch on the cheeks. The crown is brownish with a hint of rufous, and the beak is short and conical, suited for seed eating. The wings are compact and the legs are slender, colored brownish to pinkish. The plumage is smooth and well-defined, with subtle color gradients and no prominent barring or spotting.
description: A small olive-green bird with a black-and-white face, brown crown, yellow underparts, and a long straight tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive-green back, long tail, and distinct black-and-white facial markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the yellow tail feathers and the rounded shape of the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar coloration, showing the brown crown and facial pattern.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the black mask, white cheeks, and the conical beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-green back, yellow underparts, black-and-white facial mask, brown crown
